response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Reference JSON provided metadata for the announcement but no lyrics as the content is spoken word. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized manual transcription for both the English and Japanese spoken sections, ensuring semantic alignment between the two languages. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied Rule 3 (Instantaneous Transitions) for rapid-fire delivery sections and anchored all timestamps to precise vocal cord activation points.

subtitles.original: Tokyo at SGC Hall Ariake! Woo!
subtitles.english: Tokyo at SGC Hall Ariake! Woo!

subtitles.original: And it will be held on a Tuesday, on October 6th!
subtitles.english: And it will be held on a Tuesday, on October 6th!

subtitles.original: I'm super, super, duper excited for this, and I'm so glad I've got to finally announce it.
subtitles.english: I'm super, super, duper excited for this, and I'm so glad I've got to finally announce it.

subtitles.original: So I hope you guys will be really excited for it as well! Yay!
subtitles.english: So I hope you guys will be really excited for it as well! Yay!

subtitles.original: あとね、えっとソロライブも決まりました！
subtitles.english: Also, my solo live concert has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: 場所は東京SGCホール有明でございます。
subtitles.english: The venue will be SGC Hall Ariake in Tokyo.

subtitles.original: えーと、開催される日程は10月6日火曜日です。
subtitles.english: And the date it'll be held is Tuesday, October 6th.

subtitles.original: すごく楽しみにしてるし、もうとにかく、もうこんなライブがやれる機会自体がもう本当に、まさかできると思ってなくて...
subtitles.english: I'm really looking forward to it, and I honestly never thought I'd have the chance to do a concert like this...

subtitles.original: とってもワクワクしてますし、これからも準備頑張ります！
subtitles.english: I'm so excited, and I'll do my best with the preparations from here on!

subtitles.original: Please look forward to further details and information in the future!
subtitles.english: Please look forward to further details and information in the future!

subtitles.original: Last but not least, there will be a members only part starting at 1:30 PM...
subtitles.english: Last but not least, there will be a members only part starting at 1:30 PM...

subtitles.original: Pretty soon, so please come check it out if you can and join the IRyS family!
subtitles.english: Pretty soon, so please come check it out if you can and join the IRyS family!

subtitles.original: 最後に、メンバー限定パートが1時半から始まるので...
subtitles.english: Lastly, the members-only encore part starts at 1:30 PM...

subtitles.original: よかったらメンバーに入って見に来てね！
subtitles.english: So if you'd like, please join the membership and come watch!

subtitles.original: では、ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Well then, thank you very much!

subtitles.original: Bye for now, until the members part!
subtitles.english: Bye for now, until the members part!
